arts.ttl: Chris Davies reveals Krystian Bielik talks after benching Birmingham City captain
arts.sum: Chris Davies has moved to reassure Krystian Bielik that he has "a big role to play" now that the Birmingham City captain is on the fringes of the first XI. He’s a very important player who can play different positions, and I’m sure that he will find his way back into the team at some point.”

arts.ttl: Birmingham City set for injury boost as Chris Davies gives Stansfield and Anderson latest
arts.sum: Marc Leonard could bolster Birmingham City’s squad after three weeks out with a knee injury – but Chris Davies has ruled top scorer Jay Stansfield and influential winger Keshi Anderson out of the Wycombe clash. Birmingham City set for injury boost as Chris Davies gives Stansfield and Anderson latest

arts.ttl: Anderson wait and Willumsson decision - Birmingham City predicted XI for Wycombe
arts.sum: Blues have mounting injury problems meaning Chris Davies might not be able to change much from the win over Orient. (4-2-3-1): Allsop; Laird, Klarer, Davies, Cochrane; Iwata, Paik; Dowell, Willumsson, Gardner-Hickman; May

arts.ttl: Barry Fry will now hope he is wrong about Birmingham City as Hollywood script ripped up
arts.sum: Birmingham City will face Barry Fry's Peterborough United in the Vertu Trophy final at Wembley Barry Fry has never hid his affection for Birmingham City – but even his famed love for the club he managed to a league and cup double might be stretched at Wembley on Sunday, April 13.
